scoringModel.formula: Final finding score = Severity (0-6) + Impact Evidence (0-2) + Novelty (0-2), capped at 10.

severityTiers.label: S4 Critical
severityTiers.detail: Platform critical, or CVSS 9.0 and above

severityTiers.label: S0 None
severityTiers.detail: Informational only, policy-only, or no verifiable security impact

impactEvidence.detail: Exploit path, affected asset or data, and real-world consequence are clearly evidenced
Impact evidence is partial or incomplete

students.name: Tutorial 14 Group 1
students.notes: Affected organizations and technical details are withheld because the issues are either unresolved or from private platform disclosures. Evidence includes coordinated disclosure reporting and private platform duplicate confirmations.

findings.title: Sensitive data storage disclosure reported through coordination channel (case A)
findings.severityRationale: CVSS above 9, sensitive data in storage, confirmed zero-day, and not fixed yet.
findings.reportStatus: Reported through coordination channel; not fixed
findings.evidenceNote: Affected organization and technical details withheld pending remediation.
findings.scoreReason: Critical disclosure scored from CVSS above 9, sensitive data in storage, privately verified impact evidence, and confirmed zero-day status. Details are withheld because remediation is still pending.

findings.title: Sensitive data storage disclosure reported through coordination channel (case B)
findings.severityRationale: CVSS above 9, sensitive data in storage, confirmed zero-day, and not fixed yet.
findings.reportStatus: Reported through coordination channel; not fixed
findings.evidenceNote: Affected organization and technical details withheld pending remediation.
findings.scoreReason: Critical disclosure scored from CVSS above 9, sensitive data in storage, privately verified impact evidence, and confirmed zero-day status. Details are withheld because remediation is still pending.

findings.title: Private bug bounty authentication disclosure confirmed duplicate (case C)
findings.program: Private bug bounty target withheld pending approval
findings.severityRationale: Private platform duplicate confirmation shows CVSS 9.1 Critical with account takeover impact; technical details withheld.
findings.evidenceNote: Private platform duplicate confirmation; affected organization and technical details withheld.
findings.scoreReason: Private platform triage confirmed this as a duplicate. CVSS 9.1 Critical and account takeover impact support Critical severity; novelty is non-zero-day due to duplicate status.

findings.title: Private bug bounty session expiration disclosure confirmed duplicate (case D)
findings.program: Private bug bounty target withheld pending approval
findings.severityRationale: Private platform duplicate confirmation shows CVSS 9.1 Critical with authentication bypass impact; technical details withheld.
findings.evidenceNote: Private platform duplicate confirmation; affected organization and technical details withheld.
findings.scoreReason: Private platform triage confirmed this as a duplicate. CVSS 9.1 Critical and authentication bypass impact support Critical severity; novelty is non-zero-day due to duplicate status.

students.name: Tutorial 14 Group 2
students.notes: Technical details and affected organization are withheld. The organization confirmed the disclosure and fixed the issue.

findings.title: Access control disclosure confirmed and fixed
findings.severityRationale: Sensitive personal information exposure, confirmed and fixed by the affected organization; technical details withheld.
findings.evidenceNote: Scored under privacy-sensitive disclosure logic; technical details withheld.
findings.scoreReason: High-severity access control disclosure with strong impact evidence from sensitive personal information exposure, affected-organization confirmation, and fix. Technical details and the affected organization are withheld pending approval, and novelty is treated as a confirmed zero-day.

students.name: Tutorial 4 Group 2
students.notes: External platform report is a confirmed duplicate and currently treated as a validated non-zero-day finding. Affected project and report IDs are temporarily withheld.

findings.title: Mobile application URL handling issue confirmed duplicate
findings.severityRationale: External duplicate metadata shows High severity (7.7).
findings.evidenceNote: External platform confirmed duplicate status; affected project and report IDs are temporarily withheld.
findings.scoreReason: External platform triage confirmed the student's report as a duplicate. The duplicate metadata shows High severity (7.7), with strong impact evidence. Affected project and report IDs are temporarily withheld to avoid copying.

students.name: Tutorial 26 Group 5
students.notes: External platform reports are confirmed duplicates and currently treated as non-zero-day findings. Affected project, components, and report IDs are temporarily withheld.

findings.title: Critical authorization bypass confirmed duplicate
findings.scoreReason: External platform triage confirmed the student's report as a duplicate. The platform card shows Critical severity, with strong authorization-impact evidence. Affected project, component, and report IDs are temporarily withheld to avoid copying.

findings.title: Missing authorization issue confirmed duplicate
findings.scoreReason: External platform triage confirmed the student's report as a duplicate. The platform card shows High severity, with strong authorization-impact evidence. Affected project, component, and report IDs are temporarily withheld to avoid copying.
